text:
Today we’re releasing Personal Computer.

Personal Computer integrates with the Perplexity Mac App for secure orchestration across your local files, native apps, and browser.

Securely connect to any folder to search, read, and write any file locally. It can access and work across iMessage, Apple Mail, Calendar and other native Mac apps. 

When set up on a Mac mini, Personal Computer can run 24/7 in the background across all your apps and files. Start a task from your iPhone, and Personal Computer can operate on your desktop and local files using 2FA. 

Remote access from iPhone requires the latest iOS update from the App Store.

We’re rolling this out to all Perplexity Max subscribers and everyone on the waitlist starting today.

Download using the link in our bio.

Comet is now available for iOS.

Download on the App Store.

Introducing Perplexity Computer.

Computer unifies every current AI capability into one system. It can research, design, code, deploy, and manage any project end-to-end, orchestrating 19 models in parallel.

Go from a single task to hundreds of active projects. Clear your to‑do list, move active projects forward, or kick off a new side project.

Available now on web for Max subscribers. Max users get 10,000 monthly credits plus a one‑time bonus of 20,000 extra credits, granted at launch for existing users and at signup for new users, that expires 30 days after it’s granted.

Perplexity Computer can now help prepare your federal tax return. 

Select “Navigate my taxes” on Computer to give it a shot.

We’re hosting a Perplexity Computer stock pitch competition starting on March 30th for students enrolled in a US undergraduate or graduate program.

Students will have 1 week to research, analyze, and pitch a publicly-listed stock, using only Perplexity Computer.

Participants will be judged by creative use of Perplexity Computer, unique analysis, and a differentiated thesis.

Judges include Philippe Laffont (Founder & CIO of Coatue), Dan Loeb (Founder & CEO of Third Point), and Ken Hao (Chairman & Managing Partner of Silver Lake).

Register now at pplx.ai/pitch

Perplexity Computer now connects to your health apps, wearable devices, lab results, and medical records.

Build personalized tools and applications with your health data, or track everything in your health dashboard.

Now rolling out Perplexity Pro and Max subscribers in the US.

Perplexity Computer is now on mobile.

Start any task on any device. Manage Computer from your phone or desktop with cross-device synchronization.

Available now for iOS and Android.

Perplexity just reinvented the computer, with Computer.

Think of it like OpenClaw without the security vulnerabilities. To me this is the closest thing we have to Jarvis for the average consumer. 

The magic of Computer is the multi-model orchestration. Meaning, when you give it a high-level task, this beast breaks it down into multiple sub-tasks to run in parallel, tapping into 19+ frontier models to automatically assign the right one to each sub-task.

Combined with thousands of app connections, @perplexity Computer is capable of end-to-end execution across the entire context of your work.

Comment “Computer” and I’ll send you a link to try it.

Announcing Personal Computer, an always on local merge with Perplexity Computer that works for you 24/7.

It’s personal, secure, and seamlessly connected across your files, apps, and sessions through a continuously running Mac mini.

Run it safely, control it from anywhere, and access Perplexity’s secure servers for powerful performance.

Starting today, you can join the waitlist for the first Personal Computer cohort with full support and resources included.

Curious how to start using Computer? Ask Perplexity.

Computer was built for a future where planning workflows, delegating tasks to the right agents, and turning your to-do list into finished work is as simple as writing a prompt.

No one plays a symphony alone. Perplexity Computer works the same way.

Different AI models bring different strengths, which is where we recognize that intelligence comes from how they work best together.

Perplexity Computer runs an orchestra of 20+ frontier models, each tuned for a specific skill. Expert reasoning, coding, writing, and research all in the same system.

Now available for Perplexity Max users with access to Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.3 Codex, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and more.

The meaning of “computer” has evolved. The purpose hasn’t.

Imagined by @giz.akdag and @cigulevat | Inspired by Perplexity Computer.
